events.title: Art on Wheels Vintage Weekend with VSCDA
events.description: With a rich history and an unwavering commitment to preserving the legacy of vintage racing, this three-day racing spectacle promises to captivate enthusiasts and newcomers alike. Over 300 meticulously restored vintage and historic race cars, spanning 11 racing classes, will grace the iconic Road America track, presenting a mesmerizing journey through automotive history. From the graceful curves of classic sports cars to the raw power of muscle machines, every era and every passion will be showcased. A unique highlight of the event is the open-access paddock, inviting spectators to immerse ...
events.location: Road America, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Farmers & Artisans Market
events.description: Elkhart Lake’s Farmers & Artisans Market in the Village Square is a Saturday morning tradition. Pick up fresh seasonal vegetables, flowers, cheeses, local arts and specialty products from approximately 50 vendors. Every item sold is produced locally in the state of Wisconsin by the person right behind the stand! Grab your reusable grocery bags and head to the square every Saturday morning.
events.location: Elkhart Lake, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Elktoberfest Wine & Beer Run 5K
events.description: Love Wine? Like Walking or Running? This race is for you! Join us for our 5th Annual Elktoberfest Wine & Beer Run 5K on Saturday, September 19th, 2026! This fun run/walk is a great way to kick off the Elktoberfestivities on Saturday morning, featuring great wine provided by Vintage Elkhart Wine Shop and local craft beer from 3 Sheeps Brewing. With registration options for all wine and beer lovers and runners, this race is a sure thing for a great time! Sign Up Now
events.location: Vintage Elkhart Lake, 100 East Rhine Street, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Elktoberfest
events.description: Prost! Elktoberfest returns to Elkhart Lake on Saturday, September 19, 2026! It’s one full day of Bavarian fun with stein hoists, brats, pretzels, polka, and plenty of gemütlichkeit. Throw on your lederhosen or dirndl and celebrate German heritage in true Elkhart Lake style. Kick things off with the Elktoberfest Run Walk, enjoy family fun and games in the park, and end the night with live music from Boo! The Band at Siebkens. View the full schedule of events and join the festivities: 2026 Elktoberfest Schedule of Events
events.location: Elkhart Lake, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Sunset Cruise at Road America
events.description: Sunset Cruise at Road America is a leisurely, low-speed, 3-lap experience of the iconic 4-mile track with your own vehicle. It is the perfect opportunity to experience one of the premier road courses in the country. This relaxing on-track opportunity is bucket list experience for locals and fans world-wide! Sunset Cruise runs on select dates May through September. Space is limited. Advance registration is required.
events.location: Road America, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Old World Christmas Market
events.description: Reminiscent of the centuries-old Christkindlesmarkt of Nüremberg, Germany, the 27th annual Old World Christmas Market at The Osthoff Resort offers the warmth and merriment of this Old World tradition. For ten consecutive days, guests stroll the aisles of a grand heated tent bedecked with fragrant boughs of fresh evergreens and the tantalizing scents of roasted almonds and Nüremberg bratwurst as they browse for unique and specialty items among international and regional artisans. Czech blown-glass ornaments, Russian nesting dolls, German hand-carved smokers and nutcrackers, fine apparel, han...
events.location: The Osthoff Resort & Spa, 101 Osthoff Avenue, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Gluten-Free Cooking
events.description: Discover how flavorful gluten-free cooking can be in this hands-on class featuring creamy cauliflower grits with shrimp, classic chicken piccata, and a rich flourless chocolate cake. You’ll learn techniques and ingredient swaps that deliver big flavors without the gluten, creating a satisfying and approachable menu. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Cauliflower Grits with Shrimp Chicken Piccata Flourless Chocolate Cake $69 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Sushi Making
events.description: Discover the art of sushi making and learn how to craft perfect rolls with fresh ingredients, followed by a hands-on experience in preparing savory miso soup at The Osthoff Resort Cooking School. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Sushi Sauces Tuna and Salmon Maki Sashimi Nigiri $79 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Summer Cocktail Making Class
events.description: Guests will craft four refreshing summer-inspired drinks while learning mixing techniques, flavor pairings, and garnishing tips from our instructors. Enjoy a lively, interactive experience perfect for a night out with friends while enjoying the cocktails you create. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Martini Pink Paradise Punch Margarita Seasonal Special $59 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Pasta III
events.description: Dive into a hands-on pasta making class where you’ll create vibrant spinach, carrot, and squid ink pastas from scratch. The menu comes together with tender calamari, chicken, and a silky pesto cream sauce as you learn techniques for crafting colorful, restaurant-quality pasta at home. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Colored Pastas: Spinach, Carrot, and Squid Ink Pasta Calamari Pesto Cream Sauce and Chicken $79 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Argentine Steak and Sausage
events.description: Experience the bold flavors of Argentina in this hands-on cooking class featuring Argentine steak with fresh chimichurri sauce. You’ll also make savory empanadas and seasonal grilled vegetables while learning techniques for creating a vibrant, balanced meal. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Argentine Steak Chimichurri Sauce Empanadas Grilled Vegetables $79 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Persian Style Rice and Kabob
events.description: Explore the rich flavors of Persian cuisine in this hands-on cooking class featuring crispy Tahdig served with tender lamb kabobs. You’ll round out the meal with grilled vegetables and refreshing raita while learning techniques that bring bold, comforting flavors to the table. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Tahdig (Persian Rice) with Lamb Kabob Grilled Vegetables Raita $69 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Until Dawn
events.description: Live Music at The Lake Deck – Saturday, June 20, 2026 Join us for an evening of live music and a laid-back summer atmosphere on the shores of Elkhart Lake. Relax with great tunes, cold drinks, and tasty concession favorites while you unwind by the water. Open to the public.
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI

events.title: Paella Dinner
events.description: Transport your taste buds to Spain in this hands-on cooking class featuring a vibrant seafood paella made from scratch. Enjoy Spanish cheese and olives, garlic bread, a fresh salad, and sip Spanish wines and sangria as you learn techniques for creating a festive, flavor-packed meal. Price is per person plus tax and fees. Class tickets are non-refundable. Seafood Paella Spanish Cheese and Olives Garlic Bread Salad Spanish Wines and Sangria $89 per person
events.location: The Osthoff Resort, Elkhart Lake, WI
